query_title: Revenge of the Nerds II: Nerds in Paradise

recommendations.title: Freedomland
recommendations.overview: A black police detective must solve a strange case of a kidnapped boy and deal with a big racial protest.

recommendations.title: America's Sweethearts
recommendations.overview: In the midst of a nasty public breakup of married movie stars, a studio publicist scrambles to put a cap on the escalating situation as the couple's latest film has found it's only print kidnapped by the director.

recommendations.title: Christmas with the Kranks

recommendations.title: Night of the Creeps

recommendations.title: Animal House
recommendations.overview: At a 1962 College, Dean Vernon Wormer is determined to expel the entire Delta Tau Chi Fraternity, but those troublemakers have other plans for him.

recommendations.title: Wanted

recommendations.title: Subservience
recommendations.overview: With his wife out sick, a struggling father brings home a lifelike AI, only to have his self-aware new help want everything her new family has to offer... Like the affection of her owner and she'll kill to get it.

recommendations.title: School Daze
recommendations.overview: Fraternity and sorority members clash with other students at a historically black college during homecoming weekend.

recommendations.title: Vamp
recommendations.overview: Two fraternity pledges go to a sleazy bar in search of a stripper for their college friends, unaware it is occupied by vampires.

recommendations.title: Back of the Net
recommendations.overview: A new student at a soccer academy is determined to beat her rival's team in the national tournament.
